title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Motilal Oswal

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Motilal Oswal
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Motilal Oswal in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Motilal Oswal:
Motilal Oswal is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Motilal Oswal!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
